name: sudoq
description: A responsive Sudoku game built with React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Vite.

scripts.build:pages: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('assets',{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.cpSync('dist/assets','assets',{recursive:true}); fs.cpSync('dist/index.html','index.html'); fs.rmSync('icon.png',{force:true}); console.log('Synced dist output to the repo root for GitHub Pages.');"
